name: Asset Based Lending
description_short: Asset Based Lending provides short-term and long-term financing for real estate investors, including fix-and-flip loans, rental property financing, bridge loans, and new construction funding with rates starting at 6.00%.
description_long: Asset Based Lending is a specialized real estate lending company that focuses on serving property investors and developers rather than traditional homebuyers. The company offers a range of financing products designed specifically for real estate investment activities, from quick-close bridge loans to extended 30-year rental property mortgages. Their product suite includes fix-and-flip loans (12-24 month terms with up to 100% rehab financing), rental loans (30-year terms with up to 80% LTV), new construction financing (up to 75% LTV for land and 100% for construction), and bridge loans (up to 65% LTV for cash-out refinancing). The company claims to distinguish itself through a "zero-point program" that allegedly eliminates upfront point charges on loans. Asset Based Lending advertises aggressive interest rates ranging from 6.00% to 9.25% depending on loan type, loan sizes from $75K to $50M, and fast closing timelines (as few as 10 days for fix-and-flip loans). The company positions itself as investor-focused rather than consumer-focused, emphasizing property acquisition, rehabilitation, and cash-out refinancing for existing portfolios. Their rental loan product notably accepts borrowers with Debt Service Coverage Ratios as low as 1.0, which is more flexible than traditional mortgage standards. However, the website provided contains primarily marketing claims and consent/privacy boilerplate, with limited transparent disclosure of fees, terms, underwriting requirements, or borrower eligibility criteria beyond basic loan parameters.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Fast closing timelines advertised at as few as 10 days for fix-and-flip loans
Zero-point program claims to eliminate upfront loan origination points
Large loan size capacity up to $50M for certain products
Flexible DSCR requirements with rental loans accepting 1.0 DSCR averages
Comprehensive product suite covering bridge, fix-and-flip, rental, and construction loans
High LTV options including 100% rehab financing and 100% construction budget financing
30-year rental loan terms provide long-term financing flexibility for rental properties
cons: Primarily serves real estate investors, not mainstream consumers seeking personal mortgages
Advertised rates (6.00%-9.25%) are presented as starting rates with no clear disclosure of average actual rates or rate determination factors
Website lacks transparent fee disclosure, prepayment penalties, or detailed underwriting requirements despite being the primary marketing tool
Minimum loan sizes ($75K-$85K) exclude smaller borrowers or properties
Limited information about credit score requirements, debt-to-income ratios, or other standard borrowing criteria
best_for: Real estate fix-and-flip investors seeking 12-24 month bridge financing with fast closing
Rental property investors looking to refinance or purchase with flexible DSCR requirements
New construction developers and builders needing land acquisition and construction financing
Real estate portfolios seeking cash-out refinancing to fund additional investment projects
diagnosis: Asset Based Lending is best suited for experienced real estate investors and developers seeking non-traditional, investor-focused financing for property acquisition, rehabilitation, or refinancing—not for consumers seeking conventional home mortgages. The main caveat is that this is a B2B commercial lending product with pricing and terms designed for business use, not consumer protection, and transparent fee disclosure is notably absent from their marketing materials.
services: Fix-and-flip loans (12-24 months, up to 92.5% LTV purchase / 100% rehab)
Rental property loans (30-year terms, up to 80% LTV, 1.0 DSCR average)
New construction and land acquisition financing (75% land LTV, 100% construction LTV)
Bridge loans (12-24 months, up to 65% LTV, cash-out refinancing)
Zero-point loan program (claimed elimination of origination points)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 30 Montgomery St Suite 150, Jersey City, NJ 07302
